title: Logarithmic and exponential functions
summary: 9709 P3 — e^x, ln x, laws of logarithms, and modelling with PhET function builder.
learningObjectives: Use laws of logarithms to simplify expressions.
Solve equations involving e^x and ln x.
Differentiate and integrate exponential and log functions.
Apply exponential models to growth and decay.

simpleExplanation.title: Inverse exponentials
simpleExplanation.summary: e^x and ln x are inverses. Laws of logs convert products to sums — essential for solving a^x = b.
steps: ln(ab) = ln a + ln b; ln(a^n) = n ln a.
If e^x = k then x = ln k.
N = N₀e^{kt} — half-life and doubling time problems.

sections.content: **P3 exponentials** (3.2) extend **P2** (2.2). Examiners combine **differentiation** with **modelling** — state domain x > 0 for ln.
